basic_details.job_title: BARC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 10 Radiologist, Anaesthetist and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Bhabha Atomic Research Centre (BARC) Medical Specialists Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of BARC. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the BARC Medical Specialists Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 25 and 70 years who have MBBS, MD/DNB/DM/MS/DA in relevant specialty are eligible to apply for these Medical Specialists vacancies. The walk-in interview process for BARC Medical Specialists Recruitment 2026 will be conducted on 03 June 2026 and 04 June 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and attend the walk-in interview thro

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 70 years Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

qualification.details: General Physician: M.D./DNB in General Medicine, Speciality with a minimum 1 to 4 years of experience after M.D/DNB. Ophthalmologist: MS/MD/DNB (Ophthalmology) from an institute recognised by MCI. Minimum 1 to 4 years of experience. Neonatologist: DM/DNB (Neonatologist) with 4 to 10 years of experience. Radiologist: M.D. /DNB or equivalent in radio-diagnosis from a recognized University with minimum 1 to 4 years of experience. Anaesthetist: MD/DNB Anaesthesia with 1 year Experience or DA Anesthesia with 2 year Experience. Neurologist: DM/DNB (Neurology) with 10 to 16 years of experience. Dermatologist: MD/DNB in Dermatology from Institute recognized by MCI 1 to 4 years of experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 88400 approx. - Rs. 154000 approx. Per Month
salary_details.details: General Physician: Rs. 22,984/- Ophthalmologist: Rs. 91,936/- Neonatologist:Rs. 13,793/- Radiologist: Rs. 91,936/ Anaesthetist: Rs. 45,968/- Neurologist: Rs.40,040/- Dermatologist: Rs.34,476/-

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for BARC Medical Specialists?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for most of the Medical Specialist posts is scheduled for 03 June 2026. For Dermatologist, it is on 04 June 2026. Candidates should report on the specified dates.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Medical Specialists at BARC?
faq.answer: Bhabha Atomic Research Centre (BARC) is recruiting for a total of 10 Medical Specialist posts. The detailed breakdown for each specialty is available in the vacancy details section.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Medical Specialists posts at BARC?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Medical Specialists posts will receive an approximate salary ranging from Rs. 88,400 to Rs. 154,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum and maximum age limits for the Medical Specialists posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for the Medical Specialists posts is 25 years, and the maximum age limit is 70 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for BARC Medical Specialists recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Medical Specialists positions at BARC?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Medical Specialists positions at BARC involves Preliminary Screening followed by a Walk-in Interview. Candidates must clear both stages to be considered for the role.

faq.question: Q7. What qualifications are required for the Medical Specialists posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree along with an MD/DNB/DM/MS/DA in the relevant specialty. Specific experience requirements vary for each post as detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview for BARC Medical Specialists going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews will be conducted at Bhabha Atomic Research Centre, Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 400094. Candidates should report to the specified venue.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any online application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates do not need to apply online. They should directly report to the venue on the interview dates.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for BARC Medical Specialists?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for most of the Medical Specialist posts is scheduled for 03 June 2026. For Dermatologist, it is on 04 June 2026. Candidates should report on the specified dates.
